---
name: Data Quality Issue
description: Report data anomalies, gaps, or questionable measurements
title: "[DATA] "
labels: ["data-quality", "investigation"]
---

## Station Information
- **Station ID:**
- **Station Name:**
- **Date Range Affected:**

## Issue Type
- [ ] Suspicious measurement (outlier, physically improbable value)
- [ ] Data gap (missing records during expected measurement period)
- [ ] Rating curve concern (inconsistency in stage-discharge relationship)
- [ ] Metadata inconsistency (conflicting information about station or parameters)

## Description and Evidence

### Summary
*Describe the data issue in detail*

### Supporting Evidence
*Provide links, plots, or attachments demonstrating the problem*

### Context
*Include relevant details such as:*
- Hydrological conditions (e.g., flood event, drought)
- Data source and collection method
- Quality flags or notes from original data provider
- Comparison with nearby stations if applicable

## Impact Assessment

### Severity
- [ ] Critical (affects major analysis, multiple parameters)
- [ ] High (affects single parameter or time period)
- [ ] Medium (minor inconsistency, localized issue)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic or clarification needed)

### Affected Analyses
*List any published analyses or reports that may be impacted*

## Proposed Resolution
*Suggest potential fixes, corrections, or documentation updates needed*

---
**Checklist:**
- [ ] Station ID and affected date range clearly specified
- [ ] Issue type selected
- [ ] Evidence is provided and reproducible
- [ ] Impact clearly described
- [ ] Proposed approach is feasible
